title: athyrium elmeri
intro: Athyrium elmeri, also known as Elmer's lady fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Athyriaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Athyrium elmeri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Athyrium elmeri can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
